title: Single degradation over tyre-life ratio feature
summary: Add only Cumulative_Degradation divided by TyreLife as an isolated domain feature.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Add one robust ratio feature Cumulative_Degradation / (TyreLife + eps), with clipping or finite-value handling. Do not add the rest of the 001173 domain feature family.
expected_effect: Identify whether the weakly positive domain-feature family was driven by degradation ratio.
risk: The feature may duplicate existing interactions and add no signal.
